statistical_anchor: Price sits at $5.47, exactly at the 10-day high and position 1.0 in its short-term range, with a +2.82% 5-day return but a zero-session momentum streak.
volume_assessment: Volume is normal (1.25x 30-day average), indicating sustained but unconvincing participation; lacks the >1.5x conviction threshold required to sustain a breakout from established resistance.
trend_assessment: Short-term uptrend remains intact above the 50-day MA ($5.24), but price is stalled at range highs with exhausted momentum, statistically favoring consolidation or a mean reversion pullback toward $5.30–$5.24 over the next 3–5 sessions.
regime_context: Stable macro environment (Fed paused, 10Y UST ~4.2%, VIX ~17) and fixed USD/SGD rate remove directional catalysts, historically compressing SGD-denominated equity ETFs into tight consolidation channels until local earnings or policy shifts occur.
watch_items: Break below $5.24 (50-day MA) would shift statistical bias to REDUCE
>$5.50 on >1.5x volume would confirm breakout and justify continued HOLD
